'''âdh-th-m''' ('''kadhatham''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pulpectomize|pulpectomize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-th-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pulpectomize|pulpectomize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-th-m
|-
! Lemma
| kadhatham
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhatham|thidhatham]] || [[word:jidhatham|jidhatham]] || [[word:shidhatham|shidhatham]] || [[word:kidhatham|kidhatham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhatham|thuthudhatham]] || [[word:jujudhatham|jujudhatham]] || [[word:shushudhatham|shushudhatham]] || [[word:kukudhatham|kukudhatham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhatham|thudhatham]] || [[word:judhatham|judhatham]] || [[word:shudhatham|shudhatham]] || [[word:kudhatham|kudhatham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhatham|thudhatham]] || [[word:judhatham|judhatham]] || [[word:shudhatham|shudhatham]] || [[word:kudhatham|kudhatham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhatham|thedhatham]] || [[word:jedhatham|jedhatham]] || [[word:shedhatham|shedhatham]] || [[word:kedhatham|kedhatham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhatham|thothodhatham]] || [[word:jojodhatham|jojodhatham]] || [[word:shoshodhatham|shoshodhatham]] || [[word:kokodhatham|kokodhatham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhatham|thodhatham]] || [[word:jodhatham|jodhatham]] || [[word:shodhatham|shodhatham]] || [[word:kodhatham|kodhatham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhatham|thodhatham]] || [[word:jodhatham|jodhatham]] || [[word:shodhatham|shodhatham]] || [[word:kodhatham|kodhatham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhatham|thĂŠdhatham]] || [[word:jĂŠdhatham|jĂŠdhatham]] || [[word:shĂŠdhatham|shĂŠdhatham]] || [[word:kĂŠdhatham|kĂŠdhatham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhatham|thathadhatham]] || [[word:jajadhatham|jajadhatham]] || [[word:shashadhatham|shashadhatham]] || [[word:kakadhatham|kakadhatham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhatham|thadhatham]] || [[word:jadhatham|jadhatham]] || [[word:shadhatham|shadhatham]] || [[word:kadhatham|kadhatham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhatham|thadhatham]] || [[word:jadhatham|jadhatham]] || [[word:shadhatham|shadhatham]] || [[word:kadhatham|kadhatham]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhatham|shadhatham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhatham|goshadhatham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhatham|gokishadhatham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhathamnĂŒ|shadhathamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhathamnknĂŒ|goshadhathamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhathamnĂŒ|gokishadhathamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhathamshĂ«|shadhathamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhathamnkshĂ«|goshadhathamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhathamshĂ«|gokishadhathamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhathamro|shadhathamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhathamnkro|goshadhathamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhathamro|gokishadhathamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhathamu|shadhathamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhathamnkmu|goshadhathamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhathamu|gokishadhathamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhathamsher|shadhathamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhathamnksher|goshadhathamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhathamsher|gokishadhathamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhathamng|shadhathamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhathamnkng|goshadhathamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhathamng|gokishadhathamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhathamya|shadhathamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhathamnkya|goshadhathamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhathamya|gokishadhathamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhathamyam|shadhathamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhathamnkyam|goshadhathamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhathamyam|gokishadhathamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhathamnĂŒshĂ«|shadhathamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhathamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadhathamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhathamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadhathamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhathamnĂŒro|shadhathamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhathamnknĂŒro|goshadhathamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhathamnĂŒro|gokishadhathamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhathamnĂŒmu|shadhathamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhathamnknĂŒmu|goshadhathamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhathamnĂŒmu|gokishadhathamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhathamshĂ«nĂŒ|shadhathamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhathamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadhathamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhathamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadhathamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhathamshĂ«ro|shadhathamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhathamnkshĂ«ro|goshadhathamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhathamshĂ«ro|gokishadhathamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhathamshĂ«mu|shadhathamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhathamnkshĂ«mu|goshadhathamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhathamshĂ«mu|gokishadhathamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhathamronĂŒ|shadhathamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhathamnkronĂŒ|goshadhathamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhathamronĂŒ|gokishadhathamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhathamroshĂ«|shadhathamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhathamnkroshĂ«|goshadhathamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhathamroshĂ«|gokishadhathamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhathamromu|shadhathamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhathamnkromu|goshadhathamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhathamromu|gokishadhathamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhathamunĂŒ|shadhathamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhathamnkmunĂŒ|goshadhathamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhathamunĂŒ|gokishadhathamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhathamushĂ«|shadhathamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhathamnkmushĂ«|goshadhathamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhathamushĂ«|gokishadhathamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhathamuro|shadhathamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhathamnkmuro|goshadhathamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhathamuro|gokishadhathamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
